articles.title: Olympic women's sport limited to biological females
articles.summary: The women's category of Olympic sports will be limited to biological females from 2028, says the International Olympic Committee.

articles.summary: The ruling could be the beginning of the end of social media as we know it, writes the BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman.

articles.title: European Parliament gives conditional approval to EU-US trade deal
articles.summary: The agreement would see EU tariffs on US goods reduced to zero while US tariffs on EU imports set at 15%.
